# Benchmark results

<!-- Generated by `bun run bench` — do not edit by hand. -->

Raw single-threaded Draco decode time: every Draco primitive of each file is decoded
sequentially, and the table reports the median of 10 such runs (after 3 warmup runs).
The corpus is the production bundle GLBs from `example/public/models` plus the sample models
shipped in [mrdoob/draco.js](https://github.com/mrdoob/draco.js) (`samples/`, used straight
from the installed dependency). The last two columns say how minidraco compares to each other
decoder: 🟢 minidraco is faster, 🔴 minidraco is slower, ⚪ within 5% (run noise).

- Date: 2026-07-05
- Runtime: bun 1.3.14 (JavaScriptCore)
- CPU: Apple M3

| file                              | prims |   faces | minidraco |  draco.js | draco3d (wasm) | minidraco vs draco.js | minidraco vs wasm |
| --------------------------------- | ----: | ------: | --------: | --------: | -------------: | --------------------- | ----------------- |
| `canine-bundle.glb`               |     1 |     532 |   0.85 ms |   0.62 ms |        0.71 ms | 🔴 1.36x slower       | 🔴 1.19x slower   |
| `player-bundle.glb`               |     7 |   2,544 |   2.32 ms |   2.25 ms |        1.33 ms | ⚪ even               | 🔴 1.74x slower   |
| `static-bundle.glb`               |   488 | 220,879 |  49.35 ms |  51.20 ms |       49.64 ms | ⚪ even               | ⚪ even           |
| `IridescentDishWithOlives.glb`    |     4 |  24,448 |   3.99 ms |   3.63 ms |        4.41 ms | 🔴 1.10x slower       | 🟢 1.10x faster   |
| `LittlestTokyo.glb`               |    71 | 141,802 |  71.56 ms |  75.06 ms |       75.66 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.06x faster   |
| `ShaderBall2.glb`                 |     3 |  13,388 |   4.48 ms |   4.49 ms |        5.20 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.16x faster   |
| `bath_day.glb`                    |    22 |  32,158 |   5.63 ms |   5.73 ms |        5.68 ms | ⚪ even               | ⚪ even           |
| `duck.glb`                        |     1 |   4,212 |   0.81 ms |   0.84 ms |        1.10 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.36x faster   |
| `ferrari.glb`                     |    51 | 358,788 |  63.48 ms |  61.79 ms |       77.15 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.22x faster   |
| `forest_house.glb`                |    12 |  10,956 |   2.61 ms |   2.52 ms |        3.93 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.51x faster   |
| `gears.glb`                       |     3 |  21,696 |   3.32 ms |   3.03 ms |        3.49 ms | 🔴 1.10x slower       | 🟢 1.05x faster   |
| `kira.glb`                        |    43 |  51,601 |  10.27 ms |  10.39 ms |       11.40 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.11x faster   |
| `minimalistic_modern_bedroom.glb` |     4 |  10,457 |   2.75 ms |   2.71 ms |        3.10 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.13x faster   |
| `nemetona.glb`                    |     1 | 320,352 | 135.71 ms | 135.49 ms |      141.19 ms | ⚪ even               | ⚪ even           |
| `pool.glb`                        |     2 |  22,280 |   5.02 ms |   5.06 ms |        3.94 ms | ⚪ even               | 🔴 1.28x slower   |
| `rolex.glb`                       |    24 | 120,336 |  37.54 ms |  36.89 ms |       42.23 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.12x faster   |
| `venice_mask.glb`                 |     5 | 295,600 |  75.40 ms |  78.20 ms |       80.52 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.07x faster   |
| `bunny.drc`                       |     1 |  69,451 |   8.51 ms |   8.44 ms |        4.23 ms | ⚪ even               | 🔴 2.01x slower   |
| `car.drc`                         |     1 |   1,744 |   5.03 ms |   2.70 ms |        0.13 ms | 🔴 1.86x slower       | 🔴 38.65x slower  |
| `duck.drc`                        |     1 |   4,212 |   1.14 ms |   1.18 ms |        1.14 ms | ⚪ even               | ⚪ even           |

Medians of independent runs still carry roughly ±10% JIT/thermal noise — treat this as the
cross-decoder picture, not a micro-optimization ranking. V8 (browsers) ranks the decoders
differently than JSC; see the in-browser benchmark at `/bench` in the example app.
